overall.description: First-person exploration of an offshore oil platform or industrial vessel at night. The camera moves along narrow exterior walkways past lifeboats and metal superstructures, with high-fidelity lighting and atmospheric rendering characteristic of a narrative survival-horror video game.

scene_state.functional_zone: offshore platform exterior deck with lifeboat station

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the exterior platform deck, passing an orange lifeboat container on the left with a distant platform visible offshore

entered.detail: bright orange enclosed lifeboat mounted on the platform edge
industrial offshore structure with cranes visible on the horizon across dark water
large white industrial wall with piping and structural elements
metal pipe railings lining the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow exterior walkway of an offshore platform at night. An orange lifeboat container is prominent on the left while the camera moves forward along the deck, with industrial structures on the right and a distant platform visible across the dark water.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow exterior walkway between platform structures with access door

events.description: moves from open deck area into narrower walkway section between platform superstructures

agents.ego_description: continuing along the narrow walkway, approaching a metal access door illuminated by an overhead light on the right side

entered.detail: grey metal industrial door with circular window and overhead lighting fixture
steep metal staircase with open risers attached to the platform structure

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a narrower section of the platform walkway, flanked by industrial walls on both sides. A metal access door with an overhead light appears on the right, while the orange lifeboat and distant platform disappear from view behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical stair structure ascending platform superstructure

events.description: camera tilts upward from horizontal walking view to look up at the vertical stair structure

agents.ego_description: stopping at the access door and looking upward at the steep metal stairs climbing the platform structure

entered.detail: steep metal staircase with railings extending vertically up the platform tower into darkness

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at the door and tilts sharply upward, revealing a steep vertical stair structure climbing the platform tower against the dark night sky. The horizontal walkway and door fall out of view as the perspective shifts to look up the imposing metal staircase.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an industrial offshore platform that shifts from an open exterior deck to a claustrophobic corridor and finally a towering vertical ascent. It begins on a narrow walkway beside a prominent orange lifeboat container, moving forward past industrial structures with a distant platform visible across the dark water. As the camera advances, the space tightens into a narrower section flanked by industrial walls, causing the lifeboat and distant horizon to disappear from view. The movement then leads directly to a metal access door illuminated by an overhead light, where the camera comes to a halt. Finally, the perspective tilts sharply upward, leaving the walkway behind to reveal a steep, imposing metal stair structure climbing into the dark night sky.
